    location_on

    Bandra East Campus

    Church Of St. Joseph The Worker, B-9, next to Cardinal School, Subhash Nagar, Bandra East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400051

    Mumbai's Trusted
    Learning Hub

    Strategically located in the heart of Mumbai, SGCC has been the cornerstone of technical education for over two decades. Our Bandra East campus is equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure and high-speed dedicated network lines for an uninterrupted learning experience.

    train

    Prime Location

    20-minute walk from Bandra Railway station, 10-minute walk from Khar Road railway station, and 2-minute walk from Bandra Colony metro station for easy commute.

    wifi

    Modern Labs

    Fiber-optic internet and the latest hardware for all students.

    ac_unit

    AC Rooms

    Fully air-conditioned computer labs for a comfortable learning environment.

    groups

    Supportive Staff

    Experienced and friendly faculty dedicated to guiding your career journey.

    Empowering Students Everywhere

    Access our exclusive repository of free study materials, coding cheat sheets, and MSCIT practice modules. No registration required for public resources.

    download Access Resources
    SGCC

    Pioneering computer education in Mumbai since 2004. Your gateway to technical mastery and career growth.

    Powered by Gemini AI · SGCC

    live_help Frequently Asked Questions

    What courses do you offer? expand_more
    We offer a wide range of courses including MS-CIT, Tally Prime, Web Development, Graphic Design, Python, Advanced Programming, and Digital Marketing.
    Where is the campus located? expand_more
    We are located at B-9, next to Cardinal School, Subhash Nagar, Bandra East, Mumbai. It's a quick 2-minute walk from Bandra Colony metro station!
    How do I enroll in a course? expand_more
    You can enroll by visiting our Bandra East campus in person, or by filling out the online Enquiry form. Our staff will guide you through the process.
    Are your classrooms air-conditioned? expand_more
    Yes, we provide fully air-conditioned modern computer labs to ensure a comfortable and productive learning environment for all students.
    Do you provide certificates? expand_more
    Absolutely! Upon successful completion of your course and relevant exams, you will receive an industry-recognized certificate (e.g., from MKCL for MS-CIT).
